subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled by the world-illuminating fire! The sun is nigh unto setting, and its orb inclineth toward the western horizon. No light remaineth, and this servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محترق از آتش جهان افروز قریب غروبست و شمس رو بافول محل روشن نه و این عبد از
subcodes.subjects: @love as fire, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
